preset.title: Event-driven domain assurance preset
preset.targetUser: Teams maintaining inventory, ordering, payment, or workflow domains where replayable events and invariants are more important than a single HTTP request path.

recommendedWhen: Domain correctness depends on event ordering, replay, idempotency, or aggregate invariants.
Reviewers can inspect sample event traces and rule definitions locally.
The team wants conformance evidence before considering heavier formal lanes.
notRecommendedWhen: The product has no retained event trace or deterministic replay fixture.
The change is a UI-only copy update or a one-off migration with no domain invariant.
The team cannot define expected event outcomes or conformance rules.

startingCommand.purpose: Generate conformance evidence for the selected event trace fixture.

requiredInputs.name: Selected event trace fixture
requiredInputs.pathPattern: samples/conformance/sample-traces.json or project-local trace fixture path
requiredInputs.description: Provides the replayable event trace selected as the primary conformance evidence for the preset run.
requiredInputs.contract: trace event fixture validated by observability/trace-schema.yaml

requiredInputs.name: Sample domain events
requiredInputs.description: Provides deterministic replay inputs for the domain behavior under review.

requiredInputs.name: Conformance rules
requiredInputs.description: Defines invariant or rule checks over the sample event stream.

requiredInputs.name: Context Pack and Boundary Map
requiredInputs.description: Documents domain boundaries, upstream/downstream contexts, and accepted slice ownership.

requiredInputs.name: ExecPlan v2
requiredInputs.description: Connects domain tasks, replay commands, output artifacts, and rollback.

defaultVerificationCommands.purpose: Validate the domain boundary and acceptance input before replay work.
Validate the selected event trace fixture against the trace schema.
Generate deterministic conformance summary for the selected event trace fixture.
Keep the default PR-quality baseline alongside domain replay evidence.

expectedArtifacts.reviewPurpose: Shows schema and invariant results for the selected event trace fixture.
Optional smoke evidence from the generic configs/samples data and rules, not a substitute for selected-trace evidence.
Aggregates conformance findings for PR or release review.
Shows whether the ordinary local verification lane passed.
Connects conformance evidence to claim/evidence status when an assurance profile is present.

evidenceSurfaces.description: Machine-readable selected-trace schema and invariant evidence.
Record replay fixture, invariant scope, and unresolved domain-risk findings.
Optional generic configs/samples conformance smoke output; not selected-trace evidence.

escalationRule.trigger: Escalate when replay is non-deterministic, an invariant fails, ordering assumptions are disputed, or the domain is payment/auth/safety critical.
escalationRule.action: Add property/model/formal lanes and require a human decision on whether the invariant is blocking or report-only.

optionalCommands.purpose: Explore counterexamples or proof obligations when replay fixtures are insufficient.

specVerificationKit.guidance: Use the minimum profile when domain behavior can be expressed as traceable properties or BDD examples.

specKitBridge.guidance: Import Spec Kit artifacts only when domain stories/tasks are already maintained in Spec Kit format.

collectionBoundaries.approvalAuthority: human maintainer; preset output is guidance and evidence routing only
collectionBoundaries.reportOnlyReason: Domain presets select inputs, commands, and evidence surfaces; they do not approve, merge, or change policy-gate enforcement.
